meta.siteDescription: Guided mental care with clearer entry paths, public practitioner discovery, specialties, and trust-backed content.

home.title: Sawiyaa | Guided mental care entry
home.description: Start with guided matching, assessments, practitioner discovery, or support through a clearer public entry into care.

practitioners.title: Sawiyaa | Browse practitioners
practitioners.description: Browse real public practitioner profiles, specialties, languages, and trust context to choose a clearer next care step.

practitionerProfileFallback.title: Sawiyaa | Practitioner profile
practitionerProfileFallback.description: Review a public practitioner profile, specialties, credentials, trust context, and booking availability.

specialties.title: Sawiyaa | Mental health specialties
specialties.description: Explore public mental health specialties and move into the care path that fits your needs.

specialtyFallback.title: Sawiyaa | Specialty details
specialtyFallback.description: Review a public specialty, its current catalog details, and the practitioners linked to it.

articles.title: Sawiyaa | Articles
articles.description: Read published care content with trust metadata and direct links into real public care paths.

articleFallback.title: Sawiyaa | Article
articleFallback.description: Read published public care content with author and trust context where available.

refundPolicies.title: Sawiyaa | Refund policies
refundPolicies.description: Review the active refund policies for sessions and package purchases.

refundPolicySession.title: Sawiyaa | Session refund policy
refundPolicySession.description: Review the currently active refund policy for normal session payments.

refundPolicyPackage.title: Sawiyaa | Package refund policy
refundPolicyPackage.description: Review the currently active refund policy for standardized package purchases.

notFound.title: Sawiyaa | Page not found
notFound.description: This public page is not available right now or may have moved.

unavailable.title: Sawiyaa | Public page unavailable
unavailable.description: This public page could not be loaded right now. Please try again or continue from another real public path.

notFound.title: This page is not available right now
notFound.description: The page may have moved, the link may be outdated, or this public item is no longer available.

unavailable.title: We could not load this page right now
unavailable.description: This does not necessarily mean the product is unavailable. You can try again or continue from another real public path.
